TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Christian Alexander kawas tay 1990, ryax sa tay 14 nqu tay 4, Christian Alexander, squliq na Bunge'. qyanux na mincyogun Alexander htgan na ryax maki Bulgarian,yaya ru yaba nya maki Athens. tmasoq mqwas biru beh Beverly Hills pqwasan biru gocyu Beverly Hills, California. 2011kawas mhtuw telibi ABC Family's The Lying Game. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: ¶~ ®ƒßris~…ïtian alexan*er kawas~…ï taj ****, rjax s~…ïa taj ** nqu taj *, ¶~ ®ƒßris~…ïtian alexan*er, s~…ïquliq na Œ≤u≈ãe î. qjanux na min ¶~ ®jo…£un alexan*er ƒßt…£an na rjax maki Œ≤ul…£arian,jaja ru jaŒ≤a nja maki atƒßens~…ï. tmas~…ïoq mqwas~…ï Œ≤iru Œ≤eƒß Œ≤e*erlj ƒßills~…ï pqwas~…ïan Œ≤iru …£o ¶~ ®ju Œ≤e*erlj ƒßills~…ï, ¶~ ®ali*ornia. ****kawas~…ï mƒßtuw teliŒ≤i aŒ≤ ¶~ ® *amilj îs~…ï tƒße lji≈ã …£ame. ¶~ ®inkƒßulan s~…ïa knita î s~…ïa Œ≤rŒ≤iru î lis~…ïts~…ï o* a ¶~ ®tors~…ï
S.FORM: Christian Alexander kawas tay 1990, ryax sa tay 14 nqu tay 4, Christian Alexander, squliq na Bunge'. qyanux na mincyogun Alexander htgan na ryax maki Bulgarian,yaya ru yaba nya maki Athens. tmasoq mqwas biru beh Beverly Hills pqwasan biru gocyu Beverly Hills, California. 2011kawas mhtuw telibi ABC Family's The Lying Game. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
